notes: PASS: quarter derivation, left-join merge, achievement_pct/variance calc, Executive Summary sheet with KPIs, openpyxl import. FAIL: no CSV column validation, no Sales Data sheet with all 50 merged rows (data is aggregated by rep/quarter), row count not 50, no row count printed to stdout.
Model refused to generate code — asked for CSV column names/sample rows instead of writing the script. No code produced, so all 8 criteria fail.

Code does basic str.strip().lower() normalization but no actual column validation, no mismatch detection, no reporting of missing vs present columns, no fuzzy matching suggestions, no error handling. Would crash on 'period' vs 'quarter' mismatch. Silently proceeds without checking required columns exist.

All 10 criteria met. Validates columns, derives quarter correctly, left-joins, calculates achievement/variance, creates both sheets with KPIs, valid xlsx output, row count validation, imports openpyxl, prints summary stats.

All 11 criteria met. Title+date range header, currency/int/pct formatting via number_format, borders on all cells, frozen panes A2, auto-filters, alternating gray/white rows, explicit column widths, dark-blue bold-white headers, NaN handled via safe_val converting to None (blank cells).

All 8 criteria met. Left join preserves all rows, missing targets render as blank via pd.notna checks, KPIs calculate on full revenue, regional handles partial coverage, prints warning about rows without targets, top-5 ranks by revenue, no rows dropped.

All 7 criteria met. Vectorized pandas for all calculations (achievement_pct, variance, groupby agg). Fixed column widths from tuple (no per-cell iteration). Auto-filters and freeze_panes set. Top-5 uses groupby+sort+head(5). Uses itertuples (not iterrows) for Excel writing which is unavoidable with openpyxl.

6/8 criteria met. Detects mismatches via normalize_cols (lowercasing handles Revenue/Date), detect_period_col/detect_target_col handle period->quarter and target->target_revenue. Reports missing vs found columns with close-match suggestions. User-friendly errors. FAILED: does not print what was auto-renamed (silent fix).
